title: senecio antisanae
intro: Senecio antisanae, also known as Andean groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio antisanae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Senecio antisanae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
